summary: Vendor Orders Cleanup Pack testing completed. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend My Orders page at /partner/orders is fully functional with table, filters, search, and drawer components. Sidebar correctly shows 'My Orders' pointing to /partner/orders. Legacy /partner/fulfillment route is removed from sidebar and router (falls through to public site).

issues: Konekt Sales Contact shows 'Not assigned' for all orders - this is expected since no sales are assigned to these vendor orders in the test data

critical_code_review_comments: Legacy /partner/fulfillment route falls through to public site layout (blank page) instead of showing 404 or redirecting to /partner/orders. This is acceptable but could be improved with an explicit redirect.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 6 vendor orders in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Orders Cleanup Pack fully working. GET /api/vendor/orders returns vendor orders for logged-in vendor, newest first, from vendor_orders collection. POST /api/vendor/orders/{id}/status updates status. POST /api/vendor/orders/{id}/note adds notes. Frontend MyOrdersPage at /partner/orders has full-width table with Date, Order No, Customer, Type, Status, Priority columns. Status filter buttons work. VendorOrderDrawer opens on row click showing vendor order no, customer info, Konekt sales contact, work details, timeline, and action buttons. Actions (status update, report issue, add note) work from drawer. Sidebar shows 'My Orders' at /partner/orders. Legacy /partner/fulfillment is NOT in router or sidebar.

GET_vendor_orders_list.details: Returns list of vendor orders for logged-in vendor

GET_vendor_orders_sales_contact.details: Each order has sales_name, sales_phone, sales_email

GET_vendor_orders_timeline.details: Each order has timeline array with label and date

POST_vendor_orders_status_update.details: Updates status successfully, returns {ok: true, status: newStatus}

POST_vendor_orders_note_add.details: Adds note successfully, returns {ok: true, note: {...}}

partner_login_unified.details: Partner can login via /api/auth/login, gets partner_token

frontend_my_orders_page.details: Page renders at /partner/orders with full-width table

frontend_orders_table_columns.details: Table has Date, Order No, Customer, Type, Status, Priority columns

frontend_status_filters.details: All Orders, Ready, Pending Payment, In Progress, Fulfilled, Completed, Issues filter buttons work

frontend_drawer_order_summary.details: Drawer shows date, customer name, phone

frontend_drawer_sales_contact.details: Drawer shows Konekt sales contact section

frontend_drawer_work_details.details: Drawer shows work details with items

frontend_drawer_actions.details: Drawer shows action buttons (status update, report issue, add note)

frontend_drawer_status_update.details: Primary action button updates status (e.g., Mark Fulfilled)

frontend_drawer_add_note.details: Add Note button shows textarea, Save Note submits

sidebar_my_orders_link.details: Sidebar shows 'My Orders' link pointing to /partner/orders

legacy_fulfillment_removed_from_router.details: /partner/fulfillment not in App.js routes (falls through to public site)
